response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong backend and distributed-systems expertise, particularly in event-driven architectures and real-time systems (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby, re:cinq). However, his experience lacks direct alignment with fintech infrastructure, agentic AI systems in commercial/regulated environments, and scaling engineering teams to 30+ people. Recent AI-agent work at re:cinq is promising but appears lightweight compared to the role's requirements. His leadership in engineering culture and team growth is not evident in the resume.
strengths: Deep backend and distributed-systems expertise (event streaming, microservices, real-time systems)
Experience with event-driven architectures and Kubernetes (GISCollective, re:cinq)
Strong software-craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development at RIDE Capital)
concerns: No direct experience with fintech infrastructure (credit systems, payment flows, embedded finance)
Limited evidence of scaling engineering teams to 30+ people or developing senior technical-leadership layers
Agentic AI experience appears limited to MCP frameworks and developer tooling, not production multi-agent systems in high-stakes environments
